profile.name: Aker Horizons ASA
profile.about: Aker Horizons ASA is an Aker Group company listed on Oslo Børs, incorporated in 2020 and headquartered in Fornebu, Norway. It develops green energy and green industry to accelerate the transition to Net Zero, with activity in renewable energy, carbon capture, and sustainable industrial assets. Key portfolio companies have included Mainstream Renewable Power (global wind and solar developer), Aker Carbon Capture (carbon capture technology — majority sold to SLB in 2024, renamed SLB Capturi), and Aker Clean Hydrogen. In September 2025, Aker Horizons' subsidiary Aker Horizons Holding merged with AKH HoldCo AS (a subsidiary of Aker ASA), restructuring the group. CEO since October 2024 is Lars Peder Sørvaag Sperre. The company is active on five continents.

people.name: Lars Peder Sørvaag Sperre
people.title: Chief Executive Officer
people.bio: CEO from October 1, 2024. Previously held senior roles at Norske Skog ASA including group CEO (2017–2018) and SVP Corporate Strategy (2019–2023).

people.name: Kristian Monsen Røkke
people.title: Chairman
people.bio: Son of Kjell Inge Røkke. Former CIO of Aker ASA. Has extensive experience from offshore services and shipbuilding in the Aker Group.

keyFacts.label: Key portfolio
keyFacts.value: Mainstream Renewable Power, SLB Capturi (fmr. Aker Carbon Capture)

keyFacts.label: Restructuring
keyFacts.value: Aker Horizons Holding merged into AKH HoldCo AS (Sept 2025)
